Description: Total price of the project based on all assigned resources and scope hours.
Selected payment view mode that determines how the price is displayed to the user.
Displayed project cost according to selected payment view mode.
Constraints: Calculated based on total project price and duration.

Description: Starts the checkout process by taking the user to the payment tab.
Constraints: Visible when user is logged in.

Description: Rich text overview of the project.
Constraints: Supports line breaks, bullets, and block quotes. No third-party links or custom fonts allowed. Must pass content moderation.
Example: This project enables real-time AI analytics for healthcare providers...

Description: Languages used in the project.
Frameworks and tools used in the project.
Top-level categories for the project used for discovery and recommendation.
Custom tags added by the project creator for improved discoverability.
Skills associated with the project scope and tasks.
Constraints: Generated by AI based on task breakdown and assigned roles.

Description: Total number of unique team members assigned to the project.
Total number of weeks for the project across all phases.
Constraints: Auto-calculated from scope. Displayed as total only.

Description: Whether the live chat widget is shown for this project.
Constraints: True only if at least one assigned team member is online.

Description: Recently asked questions that were approved for public display.
Constraints: Must pass content moderation and be approved by team lead or project owner.
Example: ["What integrations are supported?", "Can I scale this later?"]

Description: Similar categories based on the assigned categories of this project.
Skills related to the project scope’s assigned skills.
Constraints: Derived from current project skills using semantic matching (e.g., HuggingFace).

Description: Date when the project was published to the marketplace.
Average rating of the client's past projects.
Constraints: 0 to 5 stars; calculated from review data.

Description: List of system-recommended projects based on similarity.
Constraints: Generated using semantic and category similarity.

Description: Similar projects for exploration under the same category and tag set.
List of projects recently viewed by the logged-in user.
Constraints: Stored in local/session storage; max 10 items.

Description: Common questions about the project answered by the team.
Constraints: Editable by team lead. Must pass moderation.
Example: ["How secure is this integration?", "Is it scalable?"]

Description: Secondary classifications selected during project creation.
Allows users to flag inappropriate projects.
Enables share menu for social or direct linking.
Opens help modal or contact support for this project page.
Indicates whether Klarna installment options are available at checkout.
Constraints: Optional UI toggle; shown if integrated with Klarna.

Description: Lists created by user to organize or save projects (e.g., 'Email Marketing').
Name of the user who published the project.
Email address of the project creator.
Constraints: Not shown to users unless internal.

Description: Team members assigned to the project (shown with avatars and names).
Constraints: 1 user per task; duplicates allowed across tasks.

Description: Total duration of the project, calculated from all phases.
Interactive states of the start project button.
Constraints: One of: default, hover, active, disabled.

Description: State of the save/favorite heart icon.
Secondary categories for the project (distinct from main categories).
Interactive state of the report abuse button.
